_note: Optional environment-specific policy for Mythos subagent fanout. Mythos itself only requires the fanout + prime_consumption contract. Model names, reasoning-effort, and provider-specific fields belong in the host environment (Claude Code settings, Codex config, etc.), not in the Mythos contract.

prime_consumption.required_promotion_path: subagent output -> raw/subagents/<lane>.md -> ingest-subagent.mjs -> worker-results/*.jsonl -> driver.mjs --run-dir -> next_pass_packet.json
